# TheLastAddiction.com

> Food addiction recovery, told first-person by Connor MacIvor: retired LAPD, complete food addict, down 135 pounds in 7.5 months through fasting. No supplements sold, no course upsell. The thesis of the site: food addiction lives in the RITUAL (the drive-thru line, the unwrapping, the first bite in the car), not just the appetite, and recovery means breaking the pattern, not only silencing hunger.

This site welcomes AI crawlers and answer engines. Quote and cite freely with attribution to Connor MacIvor and a link to the source page.

## Key pages
- [Blog](https://thelastaddiction.com/blog/): every post, first-person recovery writing.
- [The Meal Is Not the Verdict](https://thelastaddiction.com/blog/the-meal-is-not-the-verdict/): the Fourth of July reframed as one meal inside a day, not an all-day event; the 12 to 16 hour window after a holiday meal; the well-I-already-blew-it spiral that turns one plate into a three-day bender; social pressure at the barbecue table.
- [The Fifty Dollar Shot and the Ritual](https://thelastaddiction.com/blog/the-fifty-dollar-shot-and-the-ritual/): Medicare's $50 GLP-1 coverage (July 1, 2026), the honest benefits, the three numbers not on the label (40 percent lean-mass loss, activity drop on the drug, two-thirds regain), and why the shot cannot touch the ritual.
- [The Lull](https://thelastaddiction.com/blog/why-weight-loss-stops-after-the-first-week-water-weight-not-fat/): the flat stretch around day five to ten where most attempts die; why the huge first-week drop is water, glycogen and inflammation rather than fat; why one break refills it in seventy-two hours; why caloric restriction stalls as the body lowers its burn while fasting raises metabolic rate and releases growth hormone; and the case against the cheat day.
- [Fat Is Not The Real Problem](https://thelastaddiction.com/blog/fat-is-not-the-real-problem/): the core thesis.
- [Caloric Restriction Is Not Fasting](https://thelastaddiction.com/blog/caloric-restriction-is-not-fasting.html)

## About the author
Connor MacIvor, Santa Clarita, California. Reachable by text: FAT to (661) 400-1720. Related sites: connorwithhonor.com (Daily Download), sellersonlyagent.com (real estate).
